de: POSCO Future M, Freiwilligenarbeit zur Wiederherstellung des Flussökosystems in Pohang. [ZD Net Korea] POSCO Future M gab bekannt, dass es am 22. den freiwilligen „Future M Nature Guard Day“ in Naengcheon, Nam-gu, Stadt Pohang, durchgeführt hat, um die Artenvielfalt zu bewahren und das lokale Flussökosystem wiederherzustellen. Bei dieser ehrenamtlichen Aktivität beteiligten sich etwa 40 Mitarbeiter von POSCO Future M und ihre Familien an der Herstellung von „Samenkugeln“, indem sie roten Ton und Samen vermischten, und warfen sie in das Naengcheon-Gebiet, das 2022 nach den Schäden durch den Taifun wiederhergestellt wird Tulpenblume…
title: 포스코퓨처엠, 포항서 하천 생태계 복원 봉사활동
description: [지디넷코리아]포스코퓨처엠이 생물다양성 보전과 지역 하천 생태계 복원을 위해 22일 포항시 남구 냉천에서 ‘퓨처엠 네이처 가드 데이’ 봉사활동을 실시했다고 밝혔다.이번 봉사활동에서는 포스코퓨처엠 직원 및 가족 40여명이 참여해 황토와 씨앗을 섞어 '씨드볼'을 만들고, 2022년 태풍 피해로 복원 중인 냉천 일대에 투척했다. 씨앗이 안정적으로 발아해 생육하면, 냉천에는 국가보호종인 벌개미취를 비롯해 층꽃나무, 감국, 배초향, 털부처꽃 등 하천 환경에 적합한 다양…
en: POSCO Future M, volunteer work to restore river ecosystem in Pohang. [ZD Net Korea] POSCO Future M announced that it conducted 'Future M Nature Guard Day' volunteer work in Naengcheon, Nam-gu, Pohang City on the 22nd to preserve biodiversity and restore the local river ecosystem. In this volunteer activity, about 40 POSCO Future M employees and their families participated to make 'seed balls' by mixing red clay and seeds and threw them in the Naengcheon area, which is being restored from typhoon damage in 2022. When the seeds germinate and grow stably, cold springs contain a variety of plants suitable for the river environment, such as nationally protected species such as the nationally protected species, dogwood, chrysanthemum, prickly pear, and tulipflower…
la: POSCO Future M, opus voluntarium ad ecosystemandum flumen in Pohang restituendum. [ZD Net Korea] POSCO Future M denuntiavit quod 'Futurum M Naturam Custodiae diei' voluntarium in Naengcheon, Nam-gu, urbe Pohang die 22 ad conservandam biodiversitatem conservandam ac fluvium loci ecosystem restituendum est. In hac voluntaria actione, circiter 40 POSCO Future M conductos et familiae suas participatas facere "semen pilas" miscendo argillas et semina rubra, easque in Naengcheon area proiecit, quae ex typhonum damno anno 2022. Cum semina germinant et stabiliter crescunt, fontes frigidae varias plantas ad ambitum fluminis aptam continent, quales nationales species tutantur sicut species nationalis tuta, species, pirus, pyra.

de: Ein warmer Schauer von Kopf bis Fuß mitten auf einem Feld. „Beep beep, chochocho, chizzi, jjorolong~, beeplong~“ Es ist ein Vogelgeräusch. Schließen Sie die Augen und lauschen Sie dem Vogelgezwitscher. Es gibt keine Möglichkeit, die klare Stimme eines Vogels in menschlicher Sprache auszudrücken. Recken sich Vögel wie der Bauernfrühling auch im Frühling und haben morgens viel zu tun? In Neutteul dämmerte der Morgen eines Frühlingstages. Sobald ich aufwachte, eilte ich in meiner Pyjamahose und meinen Hausschuhen auf das Feld. Dabei geht es darum, den Ausdruck der Gemüsesorten und Bäume zu betrachten und zu fragen, wie es ihnen geht. Nach dem starken Frühlingsregen am vergangenen Donnerstag sind die Zwiebeln merklich höher und praller geworden. 3…
title: 머리부터 발끝까지, 밭 한 가운데서 하는 따뜻한 샤워
description:
"삐삐, 초초초, 찌찌, 쪼로롱~, 삐롱~"

새소리다. 눈을 감고 새소리에 귀를 기울인다. 새의 맑은 음성을 도무지 인간의 언어로 표현할 재간이 없다. 농부의 봄처럼 새들도 봄이면 기지개를 켜고 아침부터 할 일이 많은 걸까.

봄날 느루뜰에 아침이 밝았다. 일어나자마자 잠옷 바지에 슬리퍼 차림으로 서둘러 밭으로 나갔다. 채소들과 나무들 표정을 보고 안부를 묻기 위해서다. 지난주 목요일 세찬 봄비가 내린 후 양파는 눈에 띄게 키가 자랐고 몸집도 토실해졌다. 3…
en:
A warm shower from head to toe in the middle of a field. “Beep beep, chochocho, jjijji, jjorolong~, piplong~”

It's the sound of birds. Close your eyes and listen to the birdsong. There is no way to express the clear voice of a bird in human language. Like the farmer's spring, do birds also stretch themselves in spring and have a lot of work to do in the morning?

The morning dawned in Neutteul on a spring day. As soon as I woke up, I hurried out to the field in my pajama pants and slippers. This is to look at the expressions of the vegetables and trees and ask how they are doing. After the strong spring rain last Thursday, the onions grew noticeably taller and plumper. 3…
la: Imbrem calidum a capite ad calcem in medio agro. "Ave, custodite, chochocho, chizzi, jjorolong~, beeplong~" Sonus avis est. Oculos claude, et oscines audi. Non est modus expresse claram vocem avium in lingua humana. Sicut ver agricolae, an aves quoque vere se extendunt et multum mane faciunt? Mane illuxit in Neutteul verno die. Ut primum evigilavi, in pajama braccas et soleas ad campum properavi. Hoc est intueri voces herbarum et arborum et quaeramus quomodo se habeant. Post pluviam validam, quae Iovis proxima est, cepae conspicue altiores et pinguiores creverunt. 3…
